jd_text: UnlockLand is a decision system, providing foundational configuration for development decisions in real estate development, enabling developers, investors, and public-sector partners to plan, evaluate, and optimize real estate projects with speed and precision.UnlockLand is an AI-driven PropTech company recognized as one of the top innovators in the “Future of Lifestyle” PropTech Accelerator, led by the National Information Technology Development Program (NITDP) and the Real Estate General Authority (REGA) under Saudi Vision 2030. Our mission is to transform how developers, investors, and governments plan, evaluate, and optimize real-estate assets. The RoleAs VP of Business Development, you will lead UnlockLand’s growth strategy across enterprise, government, and strategic partnerships, driving revenue, pipeline, and long-term market expansion.This role sits at the intersection of sales leadership, partnerships, market entry, and deal execution, with a strong focus on complex enterprise and public-sector engagements.You will work closely with the CEO, Product, Finance, and Operations teams to turn UnlockLand’s platform into large-scale deployments and long-term contracts.What You’ll DoGrowth Strategy & Market ExpansionOwn business development strategy and GTM execution across priority marketsIdentify and pursue high-impact enterprise, government, and national programsEnterprise & Government SalesLead executive-level conversations with developers, investors, ministries, and public-sector stakeholdersManage complex sales cycles from pilot to enterprise or national rolloutPipeline & Deal ExecutionBuild and manage a strong, qualified pipelineOversee proposals, pricing strategy, negotiations, and contract structuringStrategic PartnershipsDevelop partnerships with accelerators, ministries, consultancies, and ecosystem playersDrive co-selling and joint go-to-market initiativesCross-Functional AlignmentPartner with Product to shape solutions aligned with market needsWork with Finance and Operations on pricing, delivery models, and scalabilityMarket Intelligence & PositioningBring market insights back into product, messaging, and strategyRepresent UnlockLand at industry events, forums, and partner discussionsWho You Are✅ 10–15+ years in business development, enterprise sales, or partnerships✅ Proven experience closing complex enterprise and/or government deals✅ Strong understanding of real estate, PropTech, infrastructure, or smart city ecosystems✅ Executive-level communicator with strong negotiation skills✅ Comfortable operating in long, consultative sales cycles✅ Strategic thinker who can also execute hands-on✅ Passion for AI-driven platforms and data-led decision-makingence building and scaling B2B SaaS or AI platforms
